notes: Version compatibility contract between openclaw-onboarding and blackceo-command-center. fleet-refresh.sh reads pinnedTag (or resolves latest >= minVersion when pinnedTag is null) and checks out that tag. The skill-32 installer refuses to clone a CC older than minVersion. CI fails if onboardingVersion != /version or if pinnedTag < minVersion. v11.19.0 adds self-service add+wire (roles/SOPs/personas + converge); requires CC v4.39.0 for /api/system/converge endpoint. If CC is older, converge falls back to on-box seed-workspaces.py + ingest-sop-library.sh (graceful degradation, §1.6 step 5).
